---
title: "Git and GitHub"
sidebar: slides
---

```{=html}
<div class="slide-embed-card">

  <div class="slide-embed-header">
    <span class="slide-embed-title">📊 GitHub Introduction</span>
    <div class="slide-embed-actions">

      <!-- Open in new tab -->
      <a class="slide-embed-btn"
         href="github_intro_slides.html"
         target="_blank" rel="noopener"
         title="Open slides in new browser tab">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M3.75 2h3.5a.75.75 0 0 1 0 1.5h-3.5a.25.25 0 0 0-.25.25v8.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h8.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-3.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v3.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 12.25 14h-8.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 2 12.25v-8.5C2 2.784 2.784 2 3.75 2Zm6.854-1h4.146a.25.25 0 0 1 .25.25v4.146a.25.25 0 0 1-.427.177L13.03 4.03 9.28 7.78a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042l3.75-3.75-1.543-1.543A.25.25 0 0 1 10.604 1Z"/></svg>
        Open in new tab
      </a>

      <!-- Download HTML -->
      <a class="slide-embed-btn"
         href="github_intro_slides.html"
         download="github_intro_slides.html"
         title="Download slides as self-contained HTML">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M2.75 14A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 1 12.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v2.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h10.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v2.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 13.25 14Zm-1-5.372 3.25 3.22 3.25-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.06.009.749.749 0 0 1 0 1.051l-4 3.96a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0l-4-3.96a.749.749 0 0 1 .009-1.06.749.749 0 0 1 1.051 0ZM8 10.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75-.75v-6.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v6.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75.75Z"/></svg>
        Download HTML
      </a>

      <!-- Download PowerPoint -->
      <a class="slide-embed-btn"
         href="github_intro.pptx"
         download="github_intro.pptx"
         title="Download slides as PowerPoint (importable into Google Slides)">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 16 16"><path d="M2.75 14A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 1 12.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v2.5c0 .138.112.25.25.25h10.5a.25.25 0 0 0 .25-.25v-2.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v2.5A1.75 1.75 0 0 1 13.25 14Zm-1-5.372 3.25 3.22 3.25-3.22a.749.749 0 0 1 1.06.009.749.749 0 0 1 0 1.051l-4 3.96a.75.75 0 0 1-1.06 0l-4-3.96a.749.749 0 0 1 .009-1.06.749.749 0 0 1 1.051 0ZM8 10.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75-.75v-6.5a.75.75 0 0 1 1.5 0v6.5a.75.75 0 0 1-.75.75Z"/></svg>
        Download PowerPoint
      </a>

    </div>
  </div>

  <iframe
    id="frame-github-intro"
    class="slide-embed-frame"
    src="github_intro_slides.html"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy"
    title="GitHub Introduction slides">
  </iframe>

  <div class="slide-embed-footer">
    <span>Navigate: <kbd>→</kbd> next &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>←</kbd> prev &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    <kbd>F</kbd> fullscreen &nbsp;·&nbsp; <kbd>Esc</kbd> exit &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    <kbd>S</kbd> speaker notes &nbsp;·&nbsp;
    PowerPoint can be imported into Google Slides via <strong>File → Import slides</strong></span>
  </div>

</div>
```
